CustomField.description: Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. Has this file ever been seriously delinquent? This formula checkbox will be checked if there's an associated Monitoring Event of type "90+ Days Delinquent" or "Notice of Foreclosure Proceedings."
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Has this file ever been seriously delinquent? This formula checkbox will be checked if there's an associated Monitoring Event of type "90+ Days Delinquent" or "Notice of Foreclosure Proceedings."
CustomField.label: Ever Seriously Delinquent
